game_info.title: Easy Delivery Co.
game_info.concept:
Easy Delivery Co. is a relaxing driving game with strange secrets. Chill out, make deliveries and get to know the mysterious residents of this scenic mountain town, all while earning well below minimum wage. Steam URL: https://store.steampowered.com/app/3293010/Easy_Delivery_Co/ ================================================================================ Full Description: ================================================================================ Easy Delivery Co. is a relaxing driving game with strange secrets. Chill out, make deliveries and get to know the mysterious residents of this scenic mountain town, all while earning well below minimum wage.

Join the community


About the Game

Easy Delivery Co. is a relaxing driving game, with definitely no secrets. You’ve been hired as a delivery driver in a once-lively scenic mountain town now plagued with inhospitable weather. Make deliveries and uncover the story of the town’s not-at-all mysterious residents, all while earning well below minimum wage.

Pick Up

Drive

Deliver

Explore ██ ██████

Features

  • Earn a "living" by delivering packages with your kei truck

  • Take in the atmospheric scenery or blitz through (road safety not required)

  • Buy drastically overpriced gas and get to know the locals

  • Simple controls and retro graphics

  • Listen to cool beats while driving

  • Nothing strange going on, no lore, nothing at all, we promise
game_info.description:
Welcome to Easy Delivery Co., the premier delivery service for the sleepy mountain town of Oakhaven. Your job is simple: pick up packages from the depot and deliver them to various locations around town using your trusty kei truck. 

The town is known for its serene atmosphere, dense fog, and friendly—if somewhat peculiar—residents. As you work your shift, you might notice the weather changing or catch glimpses of things in the mist. Don't worry about it; it's probably just the altitude. Focus on the road, earn your pay, and ensure every package arrives safely.
game_info.controls:
- Arrow Up / W: Accelerate
- Arrow Down / S: Brake / Reverse
- Arrow Left / A: Steer Left
- Arrow Right / D: Steer Right
- Space: Handbrake / Interact (Pick up or Deliver package when in zone)
- Shift: Boost (uses fuel)
- C: Change Camera View (Follow / Cockpit / Top-down)
- H: Honk Horn
- ESC: Pause Game
- R: Restart (only on Game Over screen)

TEST_1.test_description: Verify vehicle physics and movement response.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Initiate the game in test mode. Simulate pressing the 'Accelerate' key for 2 seconds. Record initial position and final position.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The vehicle's Z position should change significantly, and velocity should be positive. The vehicle should not remain at the origin.

TEST_2.strategy_description: Teleport the player vehicle directly into the bounding box of a generated Pickup Zone. Simulate pressing the 'Interact' key (Space).
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The `gameState.hasPackage` flag should become true, and the current objective should update to a delivery destination.
TEST_2.strategy: Teleport the player vehicle directly into the bounding box of a generated Pickup Zone. Simulate pressing the 'Interact' key (Space).
TEST_2.expected: The `gameState.hasPackage` flag should become true, and the current objective should update to a delivery destination.

TEST_3.test_description: Verify delivery completion and score update.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Force the state to `hasPackage = true` and teleport the player to the active Delivery Zone. Simulate pressing 'Interact'.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: The `gameState.score` should increase, `hasPackage` should become false, and the delivery counter should increment.
TEST_3.description: Verify delivery completion and score update.
TEST_3.strategy: Force the state to `hasPackage = true` and teleport the player to the active Delivery Zone. Simulate pressing 'Interact'.
TEST_3.expected: The `gameState.score` should increase, `hasPackage` should become false, and the delivery counter should increment.

TEST_4.strategy_description: Teleport player near a known building wall. Apply velocity vector directly towards the wall. Update physics for several frames.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: The player's position should not penetrate the building's bounding box. Velocity should be halted or reflected.
TEST_4.strategy: Teleport player near a known building wall. Apply velocity vector directly towards the wall. Update physics for several frames.
TEST_4.expected: The player's position should not penetrate the building's bounding box. Velocity should be halted or reflected.

TEST_5.strategy_description: Manually set `gameState.deliveriesCompleted` to the threshold for the first mystery event (e.g., 3). Trigger the event check.
TEST_5.expected_outcome: The `gameState.worldState.fogDensity` should increase, and a specific mystery flag (e.g., `ghostsActive`) should be set to true.
TEST_5.strategy: Manually set `gameState.deliveriesCompleted` to the threshold for the first mystery event (e.g., 3). Trigger the event check.
TEST_5.expected: The `gameState.worldState.fogDensity` should increase, and a specific mystery flag (e.g., `ghostsActive`) should be set to true.
